opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Whenever I stand up, my heart races to 140 beats a minute, my head spins, and my legs turn a purplish color.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Debilitating dizziness, a racing heart and near-fainting every time she stands, now bedbound over the last week, on a 6-month background.

symptom_narrative.onset: gradually over 6 months, severely worse over the last week
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 months of postural symptoms, now debilitating
symptom_narrative.character: lightheadedness and a racing, pounding heart on standing, with tremulousness/jitteriness
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: debilitating - bedbound, unable to shower or stand to cook without severe symptoms
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body lightheadedness on standing; reddish-purple discolouration of the lower legs when standing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: strictly on standing/being upright; immediate relief on lying down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down flat relieves it immediately
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing, being upright for more than a few minutes, and hot environments
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: extreme racing heart on standing, tremulousness, chronic fatigue, severe exercise intolerance, 'brain fog', and reddish-purple discolouration of the legs on standing (acrocyanosis); denies actual blackout
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: currently bedbound; unable to perform basic daily tasks upright

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: university student; symptoms severely disrupting studies and daily life; attempting to self-manage with water

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened and frustrated by being bedbound and disbelieved; wants a real explanation, not to be told it's anxiety

objective_data_offered.value: around 75 lying down, rising to ~125-140 within minutes of standing (home monitor/wearable)
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-tracked; a standardised clinician active-stand test is needed to confirm

objective_data_offered.value: reddish-purple discolouration of the lower legs/feet after standing a few minutes, resolving on lying down (acrocyanosis)
